CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Continued To Dec-22-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-31-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Atty. Karel Rocha, Esq. appearing for the Plaintiff: Pacific Bell Directory. Dennis Allen was presented as witness for the plaintiff. Atty. Rocha indicated that the Request for Dismissal on file was only for the Doe defendants.

After hearing the evidence presented and considering of Declarations in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: ADVANCED PRODUCT EXCHANGE INC A corporation dba Advanced Computer repair dba Advanced Internet Solutions dba Advanced Computer Consulting dba Advanced Laptop Solutions dba Advanced Peripheral Support dba Advanced Computer Systems dba Advanced Network Solutions and dba Advanced Network Solutions as follows:
Damages $57,968.00 less $89.50 equals $57,878.50
Prejudgment Interest $7,882.42
Costs $423.50, for a total of $66,184.42
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Continued To Nov-09-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
